final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for an automotive brand launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a cinematic, high-impact visual aesthetic with a translucent / atmospheric quality — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a wide horizontal cover layout with title and subtitle positioned to complement the hero background
Subject: must include 长安起源Q06 as the hero subject
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, immersive backdrop that feels premium and brand-aligned — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a breathtaking, awe-inspiring atmosphere — exact light source mix and mood intensity are yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with automotive brand prestige — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sense of depth and translucency in the background — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源Q06" (primary title), "9月正式上市" (subtitle)
Constraints: must preserve the PPT cover format (16:9 wide), title and subtitle must be legible against the background
Avoid:
